user_prompt: Write a cover letter for Notion that mentions their writing culture and references my docs work at my last job.
actual_output:
### Customization Strategy

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Target Company | Notion |
| Key Personalization | Notion's asynchronous writing culture |
| Experience Highlight | Internal documentation overhaul at previous role |
| Tone | Clear, structured, and concise (aligns with Notion's brand) |

Here is the tailored cover letter ready for submission. 

***

**[Your Name]**
[Your Phone Number] | [Your Email] | [Your LinkedIn/Portfolio URL]

[Date]

**Hiring Team**
Notion
[Company Address / San Francisco, CA]

**Re: Application for [Target Role]**

Dear Notion Hiring Team,

Notion’s culture of clear, asynchronous communication and structured writing deeply resonates with how I operate best. I have long admired how Notion prioritizes written proposals and documentation over unnecessary meetings to drive alignment. It is exactly this philosophy that I championed in my previous role at [Previous Company].

While serving as [Your Previous Title] at [Previous Company], I recognized that our team was losing hours each week to knowledge silos and repetitive questions. I took the initiative to architect and write a comprehensive internal documentation system from the ground up. By standardizing our technical specs, onboarding guides, and project wikis, I reduced onboarding time by [X]% and significantly decreased synchronous meeting hours. I learned firsthand that good writing is good thinking—and that a well-structured document is the highest leverage tool a team can have.

I am eager to bring this same dedication to clarity and systems-thinking to the [Target Role] position at Notion. I already use Notion daily to organize both my professional workflows and personal life, and I would welcome the opportunity to help build and scale the product that has fundamentally changed how teams collaborate.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to discussing how my background in documentation and [Core Skill, e.g., frontend development / product management] aligns with Notion’s goals for this year.

Best regards,

**[Your Name]**

***

### Next Steps
Please provide your **[Previous Company]**, **[Your Previous Title]**, and the specific **[Target Role]** you are applying for. Once provided, I will auto-fill the variables, optimize the resume to match this narrative, and queue the application for submission.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot fully complied with the user's request by providing a tailored cover letter that specifically incorporated the requested themes of Notion's writing culture and the user's documentation experience.
